titleStmt.title: SII 29.114: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 114. (A.R. No. B. 481 of 1961-62.) JĀGANŪR, CHIKKODI TALUK, BELGAUM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built into the backside wall of the shrine of the Māruti temple.

The right side of the slab is broken causing a loss of 8-10 letters in each line. It records a gift of land to the god Svayambhu Siddhēśvara of Bayināḷa situated in a division (name lost) consisting of 120 villages by several persons of whom Vaijarasayya, Viṭṭharasayya and Guḍḍagāmuṇḍa are mentioned. Padmarāsi-paṇḍita, the āchārya of the temple received the gift.
The grant (of land) was made specifically for the worship and offerings to the god and maintenance of the temple.

The record states that mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Tribhuvanamalla Bijjaṇadēva was in charge of the mēlāḷke of a division (name lost), while daṇḍanāyaka sēnādhipati Dhannugidēvayya and mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kattamadēvarasa were together administering the manneya of Kūnḍi-3000.
The record is dated Śaka 108(9), Pushya, Śu. 7, Sunday, uttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa probably corresponding to 1167 A.D., December 20, Wednesday. There was no saṁkrānti on that day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
caṁdra cāmara cāravē traiḷōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya
masta bhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhi rāja para(mē)
satyāśraya kuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatu pratāpa
malladēvaru kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷu sukasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ
tpāda padmōpajīvi samadhigata mahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷē
rādhīśvaraṁ suvarṇna vriṣabhadhvaja ḍamaruga tūryyanirgghōḷa
maḷa mārttaṁḍa kadanapracaṁḍa manakanakācaḷaṁ subhaṭarādi
masta saraṇāgata vajrapaṁjaraṁ pratāpa laṁkēśvara vairibhakaṇṭhīrava
giridurgamalla nissaṁkamalla nāmādi samasta praśasti sahi
thvīśvaraṁ bhujabaḷa cakravartti tribhuvanamalla bijjaṇadēva
sirada melāḷkeyaṁ sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rā
tpāda padmōpajīvigaḷappa svasti samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrī
naṁ sēnādhipati daṁḍanāyakaṁ dhannugidēvayyaṁgaḷuṁ
svasti samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ
raṁ suvarṇa garuḍadvajaṁ trivaḷi paṟeghōśaṇaṁ ṟaṭa
dhūra lāṁcchanaṁ sāhitya vidyāviriṁcanaṁ sityarādhēyaṁ saucāṁ
sāhasōttuṁga kīrttyāṁga nāliṁgita Aṁmana gandhavāraṇaṁ bhuja
taḷaprahāri nāmādi samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ
vardamāna mācaṁdrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire kūṁḍi mūṟu sāsirada manne
dadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamirddu śrīmatu kattamadēvarasaru dhannugidēva
yya nāyakaruṁ vaijarasayyaṁgaḷu viṭhṭharasayyaṁgaḷu
le nūṟippattaṟabaḷiya bāḍa śrīmatu bayināḷiya mūli
gavaṟeya liṁgādhipatiyappa guḍḍagāmuṁḍanuṁ sakavarṣa 108
puśya suddha saptami Ādityavāra Uttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇadaṁdu ba
va hoḍeya śrīmatu svayaṁbhu siddēśvaradēvargge khaṁḍasphuṭita ji
dīpa nivēdyakkaṁ Alliyācāryyarppadmarāsi paṇḍitargge
śrīmatu bayināḷiya mūḍaṇa holada loṁdana bāginiṁ
Digital edition of SII 29.114 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
